settings.heading: Build a fanbase you own
settings.text: One on one help with audience ownership, email marketing, content systems, and direct-to-fan strategy. Built for working musicians, by one.

settings.label: Audience ownership
settings.text: Move your fans from rented platforms to channels you control. Email first, everything else second.

settings.label: Email marketing that sounds like you
settings.text: Welcome sequences, newsletters, and launches written in your voice, not marketing speak.

settings.label: Content systems
settings.text: A repeatable workflow for content that feeds your list and your releases without eating your practice time.

settings.label: Lead magnets and funnels
settings.text: Free offers your listeners actually want, connected to simple funnels that grow the list on autopilot.

settings.label: Automation
settings.text: The boring parts handled by machines so the human parts stay human.

settings.label: Direct-to-fan sales
settings.text: Merch, music, lessons, and digital products sold from your own site, where you keep the margin and the data.

settings.heading: The whole system, not just tips
settings.text: Coaching covers every part of the direct-to-fan engine.

settings.title: Audit
settings.content: Before we talk, I go through your music, your content, your socials, and whatever list you have. You get an honest read on what is working and what is leaking.

settings.title: Plan
settings.content: We map your version of the ACEMM system together. What to build first, what to ignore, and what success looks like in 90 days.

settings.title: Build
settings.content: We set up the pieces: lead magnet, email platform, welcome sequence, content workflow. You build with my help, so you understand and own every part.

settings.title: Run and adjust
settings.content: Monthly working sessions to review numbers, fix what is slow, and plan launches. The system gets sharper every cycle.

settings.heading: From audit to engine
settings.text: A clear process from the first call onward.

settings.title: Strategy Call
settings.text: A focused session on your audience, content, and revenue. You leave with a plan you can run on your own.

settings.title: Coaching
settings.text: Ongoing work together while you build your direct-to-fan system. Accountability, feedback, and adjustments as you go.
settings.feature_3: Systems built with you, not for you

settings.title: Content Systems
settings.text: Done with you setup of your content engine. Email, lead magnets, automation, and a publishing workflow that fits your life.

settings.heading: Pick your level
settings.text: Every option starts with a conversation, not a contract.

settings.title: Do I need a big following for this to work?
settings.content: No. The system is designed to work from wherever you are. A small list of real fans beats a large pool of passive followers every time.

settings.title: I'm not technical. Is that a problem?
settings.content: No. We pick tools that fit your comfort level, and we set them up together. If you can post to social media, you can run this system.

settings.title: How much time does the system take to run?
settings.content: Most clients land around five hours a week once the engine is built. The setup phase takes more, which is exactly what coaching helps you get through.

settings.title: Do you only work with musicians?
settings.content: Musicians are the focus, but the same systems work for creators and small businesses. If you make things and want a direct audience, we can probably work together.

settings.heading: Start with a conversation
settings.text: Tell me where you are and where you want to go. I will tell you honestly whether I can help.
